target: 8. A Place Where Two Can Meet
(Again… I ended up here)
But still… what is this?

When I come to this beach,
various emotions keep coming at me alternately.
I feel a bit scared somehow…

No matter what, it feels like it all started from here…
That nostalgic feeling too.

Ah…
This is a strange place, isn't it?
Shinpei, you really came back.
Because I felt you were waiting here.
Haha, what is this feeling?

I don't know.
I don't understand it either.

I see…
Well, it doesn't matter anyway.

At first I was a bit nervous,
but I've gotten used to it gradually…
But that story still doesn't make sense to me?
Why do you have to go back to Tokyo so quickly?
…Sorry.

I thought you'd stay here
for the summer vacation.

Of course, I know
it was just my own selfish thinking,
but…

But… I wanted to
spend more time with Shinpei…
I was looking forward to it…

But then you're leaving
so quickly like that.
Shinpei, you're heartless.

I really am sorry.
But I've already made
quite a few arrangements.

I have a part-time job,
and there are also assignments
I need to do during the summer.

Once school starts, there'll be
more exams and training,
so I need to prepare for that…
…That's so tough?

Yes, that's why this visit
won't be very long.

I see.
In the end, Shinpei
values Tokyo life more than the island.
Why do you say that?

Do whatever you want.
You're already a Tokyo person now.

How I feel about staying on the island
doesn't matter to you at all.
Ushio…

Just go back to Tokyo already.
Be careful.
(I don't even fully understand myself…)

(But I feel like I need to
express this vague feeling inside me,
or I'll really regret it later…)
Hey, Ushio…
Huh? What?

The reason I went to Tokyo…
I guess you could say
I felt like I couldn't keep going like this…
What do you mean?

Umm, I don't even know
how to explain it myself…

If even you can't explain it,
how am I supposed to understand?
Ah… What should I say…

(Stay calm.
Now is the time to be calm yourself)

(Actually… I wanted to go to Tokyo…
No, the reason I left this island)
(Yes, that's it…)
I felt like you'd leave me behind…
Huh? I have no intention of going anywhere!

No, that's not what I mean!
I mean… you know…
You're the type to act without thinking about the future, right?

I might do that sometimes,
but it's not always like that, right?
(It's not just "sometimes"…)
So what?

Why would me being impulsive
make you go to Tokyo?

I can't explain it well…
I guess I just felt anxious.
Huh… Why?

Maybe in the future,
you'll keep getting involved in all sorts of things,
gaining all sorts of experiences…

And through that, you'll keep
succeeding and failing,
growing bigger and bigger…
So… then…

The more you grow,
the more out of reach you'll become…
That anxiety is getting bigger!

What are you talking about being out of reach?
I've always been by Shinpei's side.
Always… you…
(Oh… right)
(I wanted to be by Ushio's side forever…)
(That's why…)
(I think I wanted to change myself a little…)

(To keep walking with Ushio
from now on…)
No no no!
W-what's wrong all of a sudden!?

(If that was my true feeling,
then it's like…)

What's wrong with you?
Your face is red.

Anyway, remember this!
Someday for sure…
Y-yeah…
I don't know how many years it'll take!

(What should I say next!?
"Be a guy worthy of you"?
"Come pick you up"?)

(Either could be right…
Or maybe not…)

(But even if that's the case,
I couldn't possibly say such a line!)

Shinpei, are you okay?
You're acting weird today.

I-I'm fine!
In the end, what I wanted to say was…

I'll make a curry that's even more delicious
and make you shut up!
That's what I meant!
Shinpei…
W-what?
I don't get it.
(Ah, I feel the same…)
But I think I kind of understand.
…Huh?

You wanted to go further ahead,
didn't you?
(Yes, so I wouldn't be left behind…)
(So I could stand tall by your side…)

Well… that's about it.
So, Ushio.
I don't know how many years it'll take…
Just wait for me properly!

Yeah, I'll wait!
I'll be looking forward to it!

(Phew, I'm exhausted.
But maybe I sorted out my feelings.)

(Calm down, calm down,
but I was the one who couldn't sort out
my own feelings…)
By the way, what are you doing tonight?
Ah, the summer festival…
What?

Ah…
It seems I've gotten used to it
even though it's a festival.

Ah…
What was that thing again?

Maybe I was so excited about the festival
that I went crazy.
No, that's not it…

No, it is.
Because for you, it's the first festival
in two years, right?
Then why did you have that reason?
That's…

It was also the first festival
for me, since you were there!
Well… that's true.
Of course you'll go to the festival!

This year, Mio and Tokiko
have already decided to wear kimonos.

Hmm, what should I do?
Window didn't invite me either.

You have to go, Shinpei!
Did you forget our promise!?
A promise?

The promise that you'd buy
ten, or even a hundred takoyaki!
Huh? Did I really make that promise!?
You definitely did!
Ugh…?
But… now that you mention it…

I do seem to remember making
such a promise…

But a hundred…?
You really would eat that much, huh?

If the takoyaki aren't good,
I'll just beat you with curry!

Make a curry even more delicious than now,
and make me say "gyafun," right?
Idiot, you think I can make it delicious that fast?!
Then, it's probably takoyaki after all.

It's fine either way,
but please don't make 100 of them.
Then, I'll lose to 90.
Ah, hey!!
Hahaha!!
KEY TIPS[<color=#GF_KEY_EPILOGIE_USI>epilogue: Ushio Kofune</color>] obtained.
